name: CPI AEROSTRUCTURES INC
summary: CPI Aerostructures, Inc. manufactures structural assemblies, integrated systems, and kitting services for aerospace and defense markets. Products include wing structures, engine inlets, airborne pod structures, radar housings, complex welded components, tube bending, and electrical cables/harnesses. The company serves as a prime contractor to the U.S. Department of Defense and as a Tier 1 subcontractor to major aerospace and defense contractors, offering program management, MRO, and supply chain management services.
